ham.subject: Your flight itinerary with Airway Express - Confirmation
ham.body:
Dear Passenger,

Thank you for booking with Airway Express. Your flight details are confirmed as follows:

Flight: AE1234
Date: 20th September 2026
Departure: New Delhi (DEL) at 10:45 AM
Arrival: Mumbai (BOM) at 12:15 PM
Seat: 12A, Economy Class
Gate: 5

Booking Reference: AE-987654321

Please arrive at the airport at least 2 hours before departure. For any changes or cancellations, visit <URL>.

We wish you a pleasant journey.

Regards,
Airway Express Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear Microsoft 365 User,

We have detected that your account password is set to expire within 48 hours. To avoid interruption in your services, please verify and change your password immediately.

Click on the following link to proceed: <URL>

If you do not update your password by 30th September 2026, your account access will be blocked.

For assistance, contact Microsoft Support at <URL>.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best Regards,
Microsoft 365 Security Team
